article.title: The effectiveness of digital health interventions on anthropometric and healthy behavior in women with polycystic ovarian syndrome: a systematic review with meta-analysis.
article.authors: Zeng HF, Dou Z, Zhang YN
article.abstract: To investigate the effects of digital health interventions (DHIs) for improving anthropometric and healthy behavior in women with polycystic ovarian syndrome (PCOS).
